LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-22-599603 WITH CASE CGC-21-597398 IS GRANTED. THE TWO ACTIONS ARE CONSOLIDATED FOR ALL PURPOSES, INCLUDING DISCOVERY AND TRIAL. CEASER, CASE NO. CGC-21-597398, IS DESIGNATED THE LEAD CASE; ALL FURTHER FILINGS SHALL BE MADE IN THAT CASE. (SEE MINI MINUTES FOR COMPLETE DETAILS) COUNSEL FOR THE PREVAILING PARTY IS REQUIRED TO PREPARE A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC3.1312. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: W. TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED (302/EPS)

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-22-599603 WITH CASE CGC-21-597398
Off Calendar Aug-18-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-22-599603 WITH CASE CGC-21-597398

Defendant Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corporation's motion to consolidate Schilder v. Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corporation, Case No. CGC-22-599603 with Ceaser v. Tenderloin Neighborhood Development Corporation, Case No. CGC-21-597398, an earlier-filed class and representative wage and hour action raising substantially similar claims against Defendant, is granted. The two actions are consolidated for all purposes, including discovery and trial. Ceaser, Case No. CGC-21-597398, is designated the lead case; all further filings shall be made in that case.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC3.1312.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/EPS)
